OUTDATED_VERSION: Your version is out of date, please update the application
INVALID_EMAIL: Invalid email, email must be valid and contain lowercase letters
INVALID_PASSWORD: Invalid password, password must contain at least 6 characters
INVALID_NAME: Invalid name, name must contain only letters
EMPTY_LOGIN: Fill in the email and password fields
ERROR_REQUEST: An error occurred in the request
ERROR: An error has occurred, please try again
